text.title: Prometheus: PromQL Queries for RED, Kubernetes, and CI/CD
text.summary: Common PromQL queries for HTTP service metrics, Kubernetes resource metrics, and CI/CD pipeline metrics.

example.note: Request rate, error rate, and latency percentiles.
example.code:
# Request rate (per second over 5m) sum(rate(http_requests_total[5m])) by (service, method)
# Error rate percentage sum(rate(http_requests_total{status=~"5.."}[5m])) by (service) / sum(rate(http_requests_total[5m])) by (service) * 100
# P50, P90, P99 latency histogram_quantile(0.99, sum(rate(http_request_duration_seconds_bucket[5m])) by (le, service))

example.note: CPU usage, memory percentage, pod restarts, available replicas.
example.code:
# CPU usage percentage vs limit sum(rate(container_cpu_usage_seconds_total{namespace="production"}[5m])) by (pod) / sum(container_spec_cpu_quota / container_spec_cpu_period) by (pod) * 100
# Memory usage percentage vs limit container_memory_working_set_bytes{namespace="production"} / container_spec_memory_limit_bytes{namespace="production"} * 100
# Pod restarts in last hour increase(kube_pod_container_status_restarts_total[1h])
# Available replicas kube_deployment_status_replicas_available{namespace="production"}

example.note: Jenkins build success rate, GitLab CI pipeline duration, ArgoCD sync status.
example.code:
# Jenkins build success rate (24h) sum(rate(jenkins_builds_success_total[24h])) by (job_name) / sum(rate(jenkins_builds_total[24h])) by (job_name) * 100
# GitLab CI average pipeline duration by project avg(gitlab_ci_pipeline_duration_seconds) by (project, ref)
# ArgoCD apps out of sync argocd_app_info{sync_status!="Synced"}
# ArgoCD deployment frequency (DORA) count(increase(argocd_app_sync_total{phase="Succeeded"}[7d])) by (name)

text.reference: ServiceMonitor CRD for Kubernetes service discovery
PrometheusRule with recording rules and alerts
Shell script for pushing CI/CD metrics
